cg_collection-20000001: Though we are still forging ahead through the fog, has the ending already been decided?
cg_collection-20000002: A planned destiny? It's just another kind of excuse.
cg_collection-20000003: Shouting is utterly extinguished in the abyss of absolute silence.
cg_collection-20000004: Please don't be surprised, the future will be more...
cg_collection-20000005: Like a blade, the storm cuts through the night.
cg_collection-20000006: Perhaps you and I will be sacrifices for the truth.
cg_collection-20000007: Did destruction and rebirth always mean the same thing?
cg_collection-20000008: Anyone can have a future, right?
cg_collection-20000009: The enemy's position is clear, prepare for battle!
cg_collection-20000010: Everything is the same as usual, Commander. I will continue to stay by your side.
cg_collection-20000012: We were separated as we fled the battlefield with the assistance of a local Griffin squad, and were only reunited today…
cg_collection-20000013: Thanks to a multi-pronged pincer attack from multiple Griffin echelons, "Scarecrow" was successfully captured.
cg_collection-20000014: "Right now, I only have a single request... Save us."
cg_collection-20000015: "Intruder" issued us a challenge, but we seized her territory first.
cg_collection-20000016: "How do you feel now? Can you still fight?"
cg_collection-20000017: ST AR-15 has gone rogue and the S.F. forces have been driven off... but have we won or have we lost? Compared to that, our current circumstances are hardly a mystery...
cg_collection-20000018: 416 and Gr G11 escape the trap set by "Ouroboros". After meeting up with UMP45 and UMP9 they begin looking for someone who knows the location of the jammer.
cg_collection-20000019: After the battle with "Executioner" and "Ouroboros'" ambush, 404 Squad defeats the main S.F. fighting force in Sector S06 and successfully complete the operation.
cg_collection-20000021: It was a grand burial... and a silent farewell.
cg_collection-20000022: We have no idea what's happening inside the detention center; all we can do is prepare for the final battle and hope that the assistant Persica sent over will be able to help.
cg_collection-20000023: Another S.F. Ringleader, "Architect", discovers the location of 404 Squad, which plays right into 45's hands. The breakthrough and rescue operation officially begins.
cg_collection-20000024: "So please be nice to me. I know a lot of interesting things."
cg_collection-20000025: M4A1's Report: Why is Architect here... No, I can't think too much about it, I need to win...
cg_collection-20000026: M16 gives no reply other than a single gesture. An incredibly ordinary gesture.
cg_collection-20000028: "After countless loops and countless cycles of forgetting, all that she has left is her final obsession."
cg_collection-20000029: "One of the reasons I'm still in the world is to kill you."
cg_collection-20000030: The proud alpha wolf will never allow others to sense her weakness. On this bloodcolored snowfield, she stubbornly gazes into the distance.
cg_collection-20000031: "It's all up to you now, Commander. We're going to win."
cg_collection-20000032: In the dark underground passage, Morridow reunites with her former enemy.
cg_collection-20000033: She strokes the icy-cold gestation vat. The womb that had once birthed her is also her ultimate tomb.
cg_collection-20000034: No matter the world, no matter your choices, Agent "Angelia" will always be your comrade.
cg_collection-20000035: "Even if I'm the only one left... I have to live on..."
cg_collection-20000036: With the threat of a dirty bomb looming in the background, Angelia faces off against Yegor.
cg_collection-20000037: ...No goodbyes mean no attachments. And no attachments means safety for each other.
cg_collection-20000038: "But if we’re all idiots… Doesn’t that make us a family?"
cg_collection-20000039: 416 carries out the Commander's special mission and heads into the contaminated zone to rescue Angelia.
cg_collection-20000040: Are you going to make up stories again, Griffin's Commander?
cg_collection-20000041: And in the moment when I come face to face with the truth, I will need to choose whether to take it for my own, or destroy it...
cg_collection-20000042: At the patriot's memorial, Angelia and M4A1 discuss the meaning of sacrifice.
cg_collection-20000043: M16A1 suddenly arrives with many S.F. ringleaders in tow and they instantly destroy the white faction forces inside the theater.
cg_collection-20000044: As Sangvis forces take aim at them, ST AR-15 and AN-94 drop their weapons and raise their hands.
cg_collection-20000045: Nimogen goes mad after her head ornament is shot off.
cg_collection-20000046: Beak speeds away with M16A1 in tow, trying to evade Task Force DEFY's pursuit.
cg_collection-20000047: In the base layer of the white faction units' memories, they find a half-remembered scene from M4A1's memories.
cg_collection-20000048: "Inside the power control room full of slumbering enemies, UMP45 throws the main control switch..."
cg_collection-20000049: Once again, UMP45 relives the simualted memories of Operation Butterfly.
cg_collection-20000050: M4A1 decides to send the rest of the AR Team to support the Commander while she heads off to stop M16A1 by herself.
cg_collection-20000051: Task Force DEFY squares off against the "Sinner" mech in a deadly duel, and they ultimately defeat Yegor.
cg_collection-20000052: UMP45 decides to carry on by herself, undeterred by S.F. Meanwhile, Destroyer's brand new form is finally revealed to the others. The final showdown with Destroyer... er, I mean, Cerberus is at hand!
cg_collection-20000053: "The program will stop running as long as one of us dies."
cg_collection-20000054: RO's Report: The Commander says that they're taking part in a banquet which might be the lead-in to a major event, but the focus is still on the minor incidents around us...
cg_collection-20000055: RO's Report: We've spotted Judge again! If only we had more allies to help us this time...
cg_collection-20000056: Yegor blasts open the door to the safehouse and kills the defenseless RO635.
cg_collection-20000057: M4A1 sits numbly in place. She doesn't move, and looks like she's crying.
cg_collection-20000058: With M4A1 on her back, ST AR-15 runs at full tilt to escape the S.F. forces' pursuit.
cg_collection-20000059: "Griffin’s headed toward Sector S11? I see it, it’s a total mess over here."
cg_collection-20000060: Carter sends military forces to Griffin PMC to arrest Kryuger on trumped-up charges.
cg_collection-20000061: "All humans must die, and I am always happy to oblige them."
cg_collection-20000062: The best way to put out a fire is to blow it out by setting off a bigger explosion beside it.
cg_collection-20000063: M4A1 meets Elisa at the arranged location. After realizing OGAS has deceived them, both sides begin an intense battle.
cg_collection-20000065: "People are like trees. The higher the branches grow into the bright sky, the deeper the roots must grow into the lightless underground."
cg_collection-20000066: I never imagined that a few months later I would be in a place like this, facing a situation like this, and that our last hope rests entirely on...
cg_collection-20000067: "After this, you will face countless trials, and the right choices are always the ones that hurt you the most..."
cg_collection-20000068: One figure after another appears amidst the ruins.
cg_collection-20000069: As UMP45 investigates the source of the jamming, a distant voice speaks into her ear.
cg_collection-20000071: In a valley of blooming flowers, M4A1 engages the OGAS system that has stolen Nimogen's body in an intense battle.
cg_collection-20000072: What's the situation with M4A1? The Commander and I are very worried. Do you have any way to fix her, RO...?
cg_collection-20000073: Dandelion seizes onto a momentary weakness of M16's and connects to the OGAS inside her neural cloud, while M4 recovers the deleted memory fragments from her...
cg_collection-20000074: Amidst the flames inside the old S.F. base, "Architect" rejects "Gager's" suggestion to bring her back to Sangvis Ferri.
cg_collection-20000075: Angelia stands on the balcony and falls into contemplation as she watches the unrest on the streets from afar.
cg_collection-20000076: Angelia sees through Morridow's disguise, and Morridow flings open the cabin door and jumps off the helicopter.
cg_collection-20000078: After a long battle with RPK-16, AK-15 finally manages to subdue her.
cg_collection-20000080: "Nobody's sacrifice is without value... I'm back."
cg_collection-20000081: "I remember now... You're the last T-Doll of the AR Team..."
cg_collection-20000082: M16A1 knocks out Morridow as she attempts to flee and recovers the unconscious Dandelion.
cg_collection-20000083: "Your heart once beat with compassion, Mrs. Gray."
cg_collection-20000084: Just as the Commander's situation in the warehouse grows desperate, Griffin's S.F. forces arrive to aid them.
cg_collection-20000085: "It is a land of death that not even birds can fly over. We call it 'Avernus'."
cg_collection-20000086: RO635 assigns each team a distinct objective and conducts final battle preparations.
cg_collection-20000087: M16A1 pins RPK-16 against a wall and seizes RPK-16 by the throat.
cg_collection-20000088: When Paradeus attacks, Erma moves in front of Lyudmila.
cg_collection-20000089: Right now, she is bathed in firelight. She holds her head high atop this mass of steel.
cg_collection-20000090: "If your attack power is 5, then hers would be 530,000."
cg_collection-20000091: "On board the collapsing Colt Express, Erma holds on tightly to Maggie."
cg_collection-20000093: "Having a weakness is a terrifying thing."
cg_collection-20000094: "You should be in the world of the humans. You belong there."
cg_collection-20000095: "Turns out... all I've ever wanted is the gratification of saving lives..."
cg_collection-10000097: WTR The Pontine Marshes at Sunset
cg_collection-20000097: "That's because right now, your world is too small."
cg_collection-20000098: "From that day, I had past the point of no return."
cg_collection-10000099: SPR Wing of a Blue Roller
cg_collection-20000100: "Please give me... the dignity to die like a human..."
cg_collection-20000101: "Just a brief moment. Even just a brief moment of freedom will do."
cg_collection-20000102: Avernus falls, amidst Ruslan II's thunder.
cg_collection-20000103: Bloodstains, uniforms... The last line of defense has collapsed.
cg_collection-20000104: A lie told with malice aforethought...
